title: Baissea floribunda
taxonomy: Baissea floribunda is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Baissea, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical Africa. The family Apocynaceae is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. This classification places Baissea floribunda within a group of plants that are often characterized by their showy flowers and milky sap. The specific classification of Baissea floribunda reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the plant kingdom.
